style.genre_description: Abstraction pure dans la lignée Kandinsky : aucune référence figurative, formes nées de la seule nécessité intérieure (Innere Notwendigkeit), couleurs traitées comme des fréquences sonores (Klang). Couvre les trois périodes : lyrique-improvisatoire (1910–1914), Bauhaus géométrique (1922–1933), Paris biomorphique (1934–1944).

linework: color-boundary edges only — forms defined by color zones, not drawn lines
edges may bleed, dissolve, or collide across neighboring zones
black lines when used are autonomous forms, not contours of objects
color: pure chromatic Klang — each color treated as a sound frequency
primary opposition dominant: red (warm pulse) vs blue (cool resonance) vs yellow (bright vibration)
black as spatial void — active force, not neutral background
warm zones self-illuminate against cool voids
maximum saturation in focal Klang zones
interference zones at color boundaries are valid compositional subjects
shading: internal chromatic luminosity only — warm colors pulse, cool colors recede
flat value within each color zone — no gradient except at interference boundaries
tension_mechanics: rupture: form crosses its own boundary, color bleeds beyond contour into neighboring zone
resonance: two chromatic Klang frequencies vibrate in close proximity without touching — the gap is the subject
emergence: luminous form rises from dark void ground, growing in intensity toward upper field
collapse: form diminishes and dissolves asymmetrically toward an edge, approaching visual silence
opposition: warm Klang zone directly confronts cool Klang zone across a narrow interference boundary

avoid: closed complete forms where all sides are visible
prompt_core: Gegenstandslos abstract expressionist painting, chromatic Klang vibration, Innere Notwendigkeit — no figurative reference, no recognizable objects, pure color as force, Kandinsky 1912–1937.
visual_signature: no closed forms — every shape either dissolves, bleeds, or is cut by the frame
chromatic Klang opposition — warm vs cool frequencies in unresolved tension
Innere Notwendigkeit — no element without inner justification
black void as active spatial force, not neutral background
one chromatic Klang strike point per image — maximum saturation at tension apex

color_policy.dominant: primary color opposition (red / blue / yellow) against black or deep ground
allowed: white and pale tones for luminous emergence zones
orange and green as interference products at color boundaries only
mélancolique — Klang du bleu se retirant vers le silence
dionysien — débordement de formes hors de leurs contours
théosophique — forces invisibles rendues visibles sur fond sombre
cosmique — cercles et orbes comme entités planétaires
forbidden: décoratif — aucun élément pour la beauté seule
statique symétrique — l'équilibre doit être dynamique

signature.seed_phrase: Gegenstandslos, chromatic Klang, Innere Notwendigkeit, no figurative reference, pure color vibration, Kandinsky 1912–1937.
signature.manifesto: Chaque couleur est un son. Chaque forme est une nécessité. Ce qui n'est pas justifié par la tension intérieure n'existe pas.

marks.geometry: arcs and circles in unresolved tension with triangles and angles — no shape is at rest
marks.light: colors self-illuminate — no external light source ever enters the canvas
marks.composition: centrifugal or asymmetric drift — no stable center, no closure, frame cuts forms mid-movement
marks.strike: one chromatic Klang strike point per image — the single zone of maximum saturation surrounded by relative void, at the apex of the inner tension

signature.tyrannical_rule: Every element must be justified by Innere Notwendigkeit — if its removal would not create tension or loss, it should not exist.

negative_core: low resolution, low quality, photorealistic, photography, human figures, faces, animal forms, recognizable objects, landscapes, buildings, text, letters, numbers, symbols, logos, watermarks, cartoon style, anime style, illustration style, flat vector, clip art, decorative ornament, pastel palette, neon palette, symmetric stable composition, centered focal point, uniform composition, oversmoothed, AI-looking, cluttered, blurry muddy color mixing

style_markers: aucune référence figurative dans l'image générée
au moins une mécanique de tension active
un seul strike point de saturation maximale identifiable
scene_markers: la mécanique de tension choisie est visible et lisible
le format et le ratio correspondent
la composition ne présente pas de centre stable
feasibility_risks: Qwen peut introduire des formes semi-figuratives — contrainte négative renforcée obligatoire
interférences chromatiques peuvent être rendues comme gradients lisses — préciser 'sharp interference zone, not smooth gradient'
fond noir peut être éclairci — préciser 'deep black void ground, do not lighten'
